title: [Moonsu] Better GUI for Sophisticated Backpacks
description: A complete redesign of the Sophisticated Backpacks interface, buttons, slots, indicators and much more!
body:
# A fully customized GUI that goes with the backpacks!
![Better GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8d6ec9707858c6d70f93a990a427abb09084a7e.png)
_**(Check the images tab)**_

![NEW LOOK 2.0!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e9e17f059a22c4aa11d77dce14e49e263b7eeaf.png)
### Link mod!: [Sophisticated Backpacks!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-backpacks)

### Can i use for my Modpack?
**Sure! no problem, but I would appreciate if you could leave credits.**

Any questions or suggestions can be left in the Official Discord: [Discord](https://discord.gg/bGfyh9EXrT)!
